Contents:
Pirates of the Splitstern

Author: Arthur von Gutenberg, Esq

I write this in the hopes that this helps establish a general understanding of how dangerous the Splitstern Sea truly is.

As I write this, the amount of piracy grows tremendously across the banks and open sea of the Splitstern. This usually would not cause issue, however the Lyndhardtians have seemed keen on not helping whatsoever with piracy on this side of the sea.

That leaves me with having to write this guide, so we may better understand the pirates.

Pirates in the Splitstern can vary in race or creed, though many come from the treacherous Zybantu of the north- I curse their name. While it isn't the usual, many end up being lead in some form by either an Axian or a Tabaxi.

While usually not difficult to handle, an increase in piracy has began with the slackening of naval force across the oceans. Many ports have seen open sieges by pirates as a result, and even some have been forced into tributary with these fleets.

I believe it paramount to the survival of the economy of not just our Grenzelhoft, but the entirety of Yoheon that this be resolved.
